case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MIKULAS, SUSANNA E.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIKULAS, SUSANNA E. $2,114.18 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,114.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
